people.name: Nombre Apellido
yesterday: Set up the dev environment — built & installed the Android dev client, brought up web + API, verified the web↔API↔Supabase connection
Ran a QA bug hunt across web and mobile and documented ~8 bugs, converging on a shared root cause behind 4 broken flows, plus the mobile tab-bar and modal-not-dismissing bugs
today: Kick off the test implementation — install testing dependencies and wire up the test runner
Create the "QA Implementation" epic (Linear / GitHub Projects) with sub-issues per phase
Write the first regression tests covering the documented bugs — starting with the shared Plastik root cause (Create Report / Guard Tour / Location / Person) and the modal-not-dismissing case
